# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "BUILD_VERSION=${GITHUB_SHA::8}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/bin
          mkdir -p build/config
          mkdir -p build/scripts
          
          echo "Building application..."
          echo "Binary placeholder" > build/bin/app
          chmod +x build/bin/app
          
          echo "config_value=production" > build/config/app.conf
          echo "#!/bin/bash" > build/scripts/deploy.sh
          echo "echo 'Deploying application...'" >> build/scripts/deploy.sh
          chmod +x build/scripts/deploy.sh

      - name: Create build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build/BUILD_INFO.txt <<EOF
          Build Date: ${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}
          Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}
          Run Number: ${{ github.run_number }}
          EOF

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
          path: build/bin/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
          path: build/config/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
          path: build/scripts/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload build manifest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-info-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
          path: build/BUILD_INFO.txt
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload complete build package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
          path: build/
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 9
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Artifacts Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Version:** ${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Date:** ${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Available Artifacts:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "1. binaries-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "2. config-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "3. deployment-scripts-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "4. build-info-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "5. complete-build-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
